reason: Approved-variant swaps from content_library.md for OHSU HRBP role. (1) InGenius: base uses Set A L&D bullets ('develop guides', 'learning gaps', 'educational programs', 'enhancing program understanding'); tailored uses Set H engagement/HR approved variant ('listening sessions', 'cross-functional processes', 'program enrollment rate') per HR/HRBP track in content_library Tailoring Playbook. All Set H bullets trace directly to content_library.md Engagement/HR emphasis section — no thinning, just a different approved variant set. (2) Vestas: tailored uses HR variant bullets from content_library.md alternative framings ('Supported HRBP team by piloting', 'Delivered strategic HR solutions for business priorities across projects in employee relations, headcount, and succession planning', 'award-winning well-being initiatives recognized among 1,000+ competitors') — these replace the base onboarding/process-analysis bullets with more HRBP-relevant approved variants. The '3 global locations' metric drops because the HR variant leads with the expanded DEI pilot (23 locations) + succession/ER strategic work. No content was invented or thinned; all bullets are direct quotes from content_library.md approved variant lists.
